headline: AES (AES) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Following my remarks, Steve Coughlin, our CFO, will provide additional color on our financial performance and outlook.  Prices are rising, and the bulk of new additions over the next 5 years will be renewables and energy storage.

raw.headline: AES (AES) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
raw.summary: Following my remarks, Steve Coughlin, our CFO, will provide additional color on our financial performance and outlook.  Prices are rising, and the bulk of new additions over the next 5 years will be renewables and energy storage.

headline: AES (AES) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: At the same time, we now expect adjusted EBITDA to be towards the low end of the guidance range for the year, primarily due to the one-time impact of extreme weather in Colombia and the lower margins in the Energy Infrastructure SBU.  Steve Coughlin, our CFO, will provide more detail on our financial performance and outlook.  This includes both long-term renewable PPAs and new data center load growth at our U.S. utilities.

headline: Fitch Upgrades AES Argentina's IDR to 'B-'; Outlook Stable
summary: Fitch Ratings has upgraded AES Argentina Generacion S.A.'s Long-Term Foreign Currency and Local Currency Issuer Default Ratings to 'B-' from 'CCC+'.The Rating Outlook is Stable.AAG's ratings...
